label: Fire Extinguisher
description: A fire extinguisher is used to control small fires in emergency situations. It should be easy to access and inspected regularly.

label: Safety Helmet
description: A safety helmet helps reduce head-injury risk on construction and industrial sites. It should be checked for cracks before use.

label: Lamp
description: A lamp improves visibility in a work or learning area. Good lighting helps learners inspect details and identify hazards.

label: Duck
description: This duck model is a simple demonstration object for practicing 3D inspection, rotation, and object identification.

label: Box
description: A box can represent a container, package, or placeholder object in a training simulation. It is useful for practicing spatial awareness.

label: Traffic Cone
description: A traffic cone is used to warn people about hazards, guide movement, and mark restricted or unsafe areas.

source.name: Kenney City Kit (Roads)
source.credit: Kenney; attribution not required under CC0.

label: Construction Barrier
description: A construction barrier separates people from hazards and helps define safe movement paths around work zones.

source.name: Kenney City Kit (Roads)
source.credit: Kenney; attribution not required under CC0.

label: Warning Sign
description: A warning sign communicates hazards or caution areas so learners can identify risks before entering a space.

source.name: Kenney Factory Kit
source.credit: Kenney; attribution not required under CC0.

label: Control Lever
description: A control lever is used to operate or isolate machinery. In training, it supports equipment-control and lockout awareness scenarios.

source.name: Kenney Factory Kit
source.credit: Kenney; attribution not required under CC0.

label: Laptop
description: A laptop is a portable computer used for digital learning, remote work, documentation, and technical training activities.

source.name: Kenney Furniture Kit
source.credit: Kenney; attribution not required under CC0.

label: Monitor
description: A monitor displays information from a computer or training system and helps learners inspect visual instructions or dashboards.

source.name: Kenney Furniture Kit
source.credit: Kenney; attribution not required under CC0.

label: Keyboard
description: A keyboard is an input device used to enter text and commands into computers, control panels, and learning systems.

source.name: Kenney Furniture Kit
source.credit: Kenney; attribution not required under CC0.

label: Computer Mouse
description: A computer mouse is an input device used to point, select, and interact with digital learning interfaces.

source.name: Kenney Furniture Kit
source.credit: Kenney; attribution not required under CC0.

label: Office Chair
description: An office chair supports seated work and can be used in ergonomics, workstation layout, and classroom simulation scenarios.

source.name: Kenney Furniture Kit
source.credit: Kenney; attribution not required under CC0.

label: Vintage Leather Sofa
description: A vintage leather sofa is seating furniture used in lounge, office, or classroom scenarios. It supports layout planning, ergonomic discussion, and object-identification practice.

source.name: Poly Haven Sofa 03
source.credit: Poly Haven; attribution not required under CC0.

label: Vintage Boombox
description: A vintage boombox is a portable audio device used for music playback. In training scenes, it can represent electronics, sound equipment, or retro technology.

source.name: Poly Haven Boombox
source.credit: Poly Haven; attribution not required under CC0.

label: Cordless Drill
description: A cordless drill is a portable power tool used for drilling holes and driving fasteners. It supports tool-identification and workshop safety scenarios.

source.name: Poly Haven Drill 01
source.credit: Poly Haven; attribution not required under CC0.

label: Garden Trowel
description: A garden trowel is a small hand tool used for digging, planting, and landscaping work. It supports outdoor-work and tool-handling training scenarios.

source.name: Poly Haven Trowel 01
source.credit: Poly Haven; attribution not required under CC0.

label: Vintage Television
description: A vintage television is a CRT-style display device used for retro electronics and media scenes. It can represent screens, displays, and older classroom technology.

source.name: Poly Haven Television 01
source.credit: Poly Haven; attribution not required under CC0.

label: Sphere
description: A sphere is a simple generic object used as a placeholder or marker in 3D learning scenes.
